ML Platform deck rebuilt on the shared flip-card framework

Slides 1-8 now use the same front-face and back-face contract as the LiveTile Studio canvas tiles in the pattern library: category badge, flip hint, copyable schema JSON, accessible keyboard flip, richer visual rendering, and real thumbnail previews.

8Slides
0Tiles
MidnightTheme
FlipCardFront/back contract
Slide Tags
Tile Overlap

Overlap: tiles stack with offset at shared positions. Shift: colliding tiles nudge to adjacent cells. Off: standard grid, no collision logic.

Theme
01/8 ML Platform Overview
